ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "flag_path" TEXT /* Path to the country's flag image */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the area type (e.g., CFP, AFMA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the area type is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the area type data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the area belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the area */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "alternate_area_name" TEXT /* Alternate name of the area */,
  "area_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the area */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the area boundary */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the area data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES area_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_mapping" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region mapping */,
  "area_id" TEXT /* ID of the area this region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the region */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the region boundary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region mapping data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_mapping_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "area_id" TEXT /* ID of the area this population data belongs to */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count in the area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the population data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the population data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_population_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "area_id" TEXT /* ID of the area this statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., GDP, Land Area) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the statistic data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the statistic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_statistics_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image record */,
  "area_id" TEXT /* ID of the area this image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the image data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_images_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "area_id" TEXT /* ID of the area being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the area */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the area data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
